name: risky
description: Large, complex refactor; risk-scoring puts aggregate risk over the escalate threshold.

pr.title: Rework job scheduler to a priority queue
pr.author: alex
pr.description: Replaces the FIFO scheduler with a priority queue touching 14 files across the worker and store layers. Behaviour-preserving but broad.

risk-scoring.summary: Broad blast radius across worker + store with non-trivial concurrency changes; high scope and complexity.

semantic-review.summary: The change implements the described priority-queue rework and preserves observable ordering guarantees.
semantic-review.intentSummary: Swap FIFO scheduling for a priority queue without changing public behaviour.
